---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or Worker logs (`wrangler tail` output).

## Environment

- Browser (if dashboard issue): Chrome / Firefox / Safari
- Wrangler version: `npx wrangler --version`
- Deployment: local dev / production

## Additional Context

Anything else relevant.
